title: Phase 1: Sort Conditions
description: Implement standalone predicate evaluators matching DynamoDB KeyConditionExpression operators: eq, ne, lt, lte, gt, gte, between, begins_with, contains. No dependencies on other modules. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Phase 1 in progress. Sort conditions implemented in Python and Rust. Parity checker needs update to handle Rust regex= step attributes. See virt-337cae for detail.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Phase 1 complete. All sort condition operators implemented in both Python and Rust at 100% coverage. Committed and pushed (a258eef).
